title: pilosella auriculoides subsp. tanythrix
intro: Pilosella auriculoides subsp. tanythrix is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. It is a rare and endangered species found primarily in the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems and respiratory infections. Pilosella auriculoides subsp. tanythrix can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is considered to have potential health benefits in reducing inflammation and improving overall well-being.
